pullRequest.title: [DOM-55579] Minor text edits for AI Gateway Admin UI

nodes.body: Besides the page title, AppContent adds the container styles to the page. Isn't any style getting broken when removing it?
I'm actually not seeing any styling being broken by removing it. The only reason I removed it was to fix the font size for the heading

There is a work in progress for removing the scala templates. Given that we should avoid adding new content to the scala template when possible. In this case the admin page component is defined right below this h1 element, so it should be possible to add this new title inside that component.
What was the reason to add this header tag and remove the AppContent wrapper? Was the font size incorrect?

@DDL-Martin-Gazzara Yes that's correct - The font size was incorrect with the `AppContent` wrapper. If you take a look at other admin pages you can see the difference.

Please feel free to push changes to this branch if there's a way to keep the `AppContent` wrapper with the correct heading size :)
